response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development across various domains, including C++ and SQL, but his experience does not align closely with the capital markets, fixed-income systems, or investment banking domains. Most of his recent roles have focused on web, mobile, and AI-agent infrastructure development, with limited evidence of domain-specific financial systems experience. His C++ experience is dated (last significant C++ work was in 2015) and lacks recent relevance to Windows-based capital markets systems.
strengths: Strong C++ background with experience in embedded and low-latency systems (e.g., National Instruments, Dunnhumby)
Proficient in SQL and database management across multiple projects
Demonstrated ability to work in financial services-adjacent roles (RIDE Capital, re:cinq)
concerns: No clear domain expertise in fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets systems
Limited recent C++ experience (last major role in 2015) on Windows platforms
Lack of exposure to mandatory capital markets technologies (e.g., Summit platform, Kafka, MQ)

key_factors.factor: Fixed Income / Capital Markets domain expertise
